title: @jxnlco 号召关注 @dkundel 征集 Codex 内容
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
jason
@jxnlco
most people don't know this but when codex can't answer a question about something at work
I go to @ dkundel
this is your chance to get him to write something
* windows codex app
* [redacted]
* [redacted]
* he work on gpt-oss
* codex rescue
* basically every model launch
* [redacted]
comment in that thread and make sure to follow him
dominik kundel
@dkundel
8h
I've been way too close to 20k followers for too long. @ jxnlco offered content for gaining followers and it worked for him 😄 but what Codex content would you want to read more about from me? 😄
10:57 PM · Jun 18, 2026 23.3K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: @jxnlco 号召关注 @dkundel 征集 Codex 内容
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Jason Liu（@jxnlco）透露，当 Codex 无法回答工作问题时，他会向 @dkundel 求助。他鼓励大家评论并关注 @dkundel，促使其撰写有关 Windows Codex app、GPT-OSS、Codex rescue 以及模型发布等主题的内容。@dkundel 此前表示自己即将达到 2 万粉丝，正向社区征集想看的 Codex 内容。

key_excerpts.text: Jason Liu（@jxnlco）透露，当 Codex 无法回答工作问题时，他会向 @dkundel 求助。他鼓励大家评论并关注 @dkundel，促使其撰写有关 Windows Codex app、GPT-OSS、Codex rescue 以及模型发布等主题的内容。@dkundel 此前表示自己即将达到 2 万粉丝，正向社区征集想看的 Codex 内容。
